backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile storage, trial/standard/premium membership lifecycle, and admin controls, all gated by an access-control mixin that checks caller permissions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two hero-banner requirements (full-width background image and centered overlay content) to HeroSection.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON catalog of short summaries for every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose, styling tokens, and key behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads Playfair Display and Space Grotesk from Google Fonts and mounts the React app at #root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with index and membership routes, and renders a profile-setup modal for newly authenticated users who have no saved profile.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: App footer displaying the copyright year and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM parameters, styled with cream background and terracotta accents.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with the Actuality Studio logo, five nav links (mixing TanStack Router links and anchor-scroll buttons), user profile display, and a responsive hamburger menu for mobile.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background photo of McKinley Elementary School, overlay gradients, and a CTA button that triggers Internet Identity login or creates a trial membership and navigates to the membership page.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a Header, Footer, and a decorative SVG vine divider, rendering child routes via TanStack Router's Outlet.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Reusable login/logout button supporting default and compact variants, using Internet Identity for authentication and clearing React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MembershipCard.t: Displays the caller's membership status (unauthenticated, loading, error, no membership, or active), offering trial creation and NFT minting actions via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog shown on first login that prompts the user to enter a display name and saves it via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation; cannot be dismissed without submitting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, exposing identity, login/logout functions, and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for user profile (get/save) and membership (get state, create trial, mint NFT) operations against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines an autumn/spring warm color palette using OKLCH CSS variables, and adds custom utility classes for gradients, glows, card styles, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack Query and Internet Identity providers before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page component featuring a hero section, a three-column features grid (on-chain identity, free trial, NFT membership), and a membership CTA section with decorative SVG leaf motifs.
frontend/src/pages/MembershipPage.tsx: Membership management page that shows the MembershipCard for authenticated users or a login prompt with Internet Identity for unauthenticated users, decorated with SVG leaf motifs.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive parameters from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based semantic color palettes (terracotta, sage, gold, blush, cream, forest), custom font families, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall state of the 'Actuality Studio' ICP full-stack app, including architectural notes, design theme (Autumn/Spring palette), existing features, known issues, and generated image requirements at schema version 1.0.0 / project state version 9.
